note: Owner-declared self-assessment of whether PCC is still becoming what it was meant to be. This is NOT machine proof — declared_status is the owner's judgment; the Proof Card (deterministic, from the verification taxonomy) is separate and must not be confused with these. v1 enum caps at 'built'; locally_proven/independently_proven wait for the evidence-status step.

promises.label: Reduce owner babysitting
promises.evidence: Signals, generated handoff, lifecycle, verification taxonomy, in-app backup, and project switching remove repeated owner control work.
promises.not_proven: Longer real-project soak still needed to prove babysitting actually dropped.

promises.label: Never fake completion
promises.evidence: Proof taxonomy (review vs executed), lifecycle phase-close gate, honest stale/NOT-PROVEN language, and CI as independent execution proof.
promises.not_proven: Real Claude/Codex boundary captures still pending.

promises.label: Survive dead chats
promises.evidence: PROJECT.md memory, generated handoff, recent-decisions carry-forward, per-chat session ids.
promises.not_proven: Needs more repeated real rollover use.

promises.label: Make the next action obvious
promises.evidence: Lifecycle bar shows the current stage and only the legal next steps; the Owner Overview now surfaces one next best move.
promises.not_proven: Needs real use to confirm it reliably points to the right move.

promises.label: Give a non-coder owner clear project confidence
promises.evidence: The Owner/Visionary Overview translates deterministic truth into condition, needs-owner, next move, and proof.
promises.not_proven: Just built; not yet proven in real daily use.

promises.label: Stay local-first and use no paid API
promises.evidence: Electron app over local files/scripts; Claude CLI login path; deterministic zero-LLM runtime; CI needs no API key.
